Class BackdoorRoom

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
gui.room.Room
gui.room.BackdoorRoom
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class BackdoorRoom extends Room
Backdoor room UI

    Reset the room by clearing all ItemSprites in the room
    and updating the item dropper stock amount that increased due to player's ingredient order to the shop.

    • initItemDropper

      private void initItemDropper()
      Initializes the item dropper UI component.

    • createIngredientChooser

      private void createIngredientChooser(javafx.scene.layout.GridPane gridPane, int rowNumber, String displayImageURL, ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType, int startAmount)
      Creates an ingredient chooser row in the given grid pane.
      Parameters:
      gridPane - the grid pane
      rowNumber - the row index
      displayImageURL - the image URL for the ingredient
      itemSpriteType - the type of the item sprite
      startAmount - the starting stock amount

    • initNewItem

      private void initNewItem(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType)
      Instantiates a new item from the dropper.
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - the type of item to drop

    • resetRoom

      public void resetRoom()
      Reset the room by clearing all ItemSprites in the room
      and updating the item dropper stock amount that increased due to player's ingredient order to the shop.
      Overrides:
      resetRoom in class Room
